HGSS.302.0000:
Welcome to the Pokéathlon!\f
Today’s event--
the [0401,0000,0000]!\f
Who will shine brightest today?
Let’s meet the competitors!\f
HGSS.302.0002:
All right, we’re ready!
Aim for the top! Let’s\f
[0205][FF01,00C8]POKéATHLON!\f
HGSS.302.0003:
Great job, athletes!\f
Which team fought the hardest?
We’ve got the results!\f
But first...
who’s overflowing with fighting spirit?\f
HGSS.302.0004:
A Challenge Bonus for
Pokémon and Team!\f
HGSS.302.0014:
Next up...
the prize for effort!\f
HGSS.302.0015: The Pokémon that jumped the most...\f
HGSS.302.0016: The Pokémon that hit the most...\f
HGSS.302.0017: The Pokémon that failed the most...\f
HGSS.302.0018: The Pokémon that dashed the most...\f
HGSS.302.0019:
The Pokémon that missed collecting
the most points...\f
HGSS.302.0022:
Finally...
we’ll add up the event points!\f
HGSS.302.0024:
What? We have a tie!?
Well, we settle ties by a drawing!\f
No, no, hmm...
...\f
...
Got it!\f
HGSS.302.0029:
Team [0103,0000,0000] beat its personal
best at the [0401,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.302.0031:
Congratulations!
That was a wonderful Performance!\f
Keep aiming to be the top Pokéathlete!\f
That is...
Pokéathlon\f
[0205][FF01,00C8]FOREVER!\f
HGSS.302.0032:
Joined [0137,0001,0000] times!
A new name in Pokéathletes!\f
HGSS.302.0033:
Joined [0137,0001,0000] times!
A Pokéathlete shooting star!\f
HGSS.302.0035:
Joined [0137,0001,0000] times!
A Pokéathlete galaxy-sized explosion!\f
HGSS.302.0036:
Aim for the championship!
On a Pokéathlon shooting star!\f
HGSS.302.0037:
Overall victory, [0137,0001,0000] times!
The Pokéathlon is yours!\f
HGSS.302.0038:
Overall victory, [0137,0001,0000] times!
Tomorrow, seize the Pokéathlon!\f
HGSS.302.0039:
Overall victory, [0137,0001,0000] times!
The Pokéathlon is mine!\f
HGSS.302.0040:
If you try your best and don’t fail...
you’re sure to do better!\f
HGSS.302.0041:
Last Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
That’s all right. I’ll keep trying!\f
HGSS.302.0042:
Last Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
That doesn’t matter at all!\f
HGSS.302.0043:
Last Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
Nobody’s seen my back yet!\f
HGSS.302.0044:
Aim for number one!
It starts today!\f
HGSS.302.0045:
First Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
All right! Will you come with me?\f
HGSS.302.0046:
First Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
Were you still really counting this time?\f
HGSS.302.0047:
First Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
Don’t tell me, another First Place?!\f
HGSS.302.0048:
Don’t worry about failure!
Falling down is not the end!\f
HGSS.302.0049:
Last Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
Fall down seven times. Get up eight!\f
HGSS.302.0050:
Last Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
That’s my distinguishing feature!\f
HGSS.302.0051:
Last Place, [0137,0001,0000] times!
This record is what I’m famous for!\f
HGSS.302.0052:
Winning with true strength?
Or just winning with luck?!\f
HGSS.302.0054:
Closing-ceremony bonus awards.
[0137,0001,0000] times. That’s true strength!\f
HGSS.302.0055:
Closing-ceremony bonus awards.
[0137,0001,0000] times. Luck and true strength!\f
HGSS.302.0056:
Always giving instructions to Pokémon!
Howl for heaps of championships!\f
HGSS.302.0057:
Will that teamwork be enough to
change history?\f
HGSS.302.0058:
Look at this! This teamwork! It’s
amazing! You can feel the friendship!\f
HGSS.302.0059:
That’s right. We can read
each other’s minds!\f
HGSS.302.0060:
It doesn’t end when you fall! As long
as there’s a championship!\f
HGSS.302.0061:
Failed [0137,0001,0000] times! Only the number
of times you’ve fainted has increased!\f
HGSS.302.0062:
Failed [0137,0001,0000] times!
Failure is just a shortcut to success!\f
HGSS.302.0063:
Failed [0137,0001,0000] times!
Failure is the source of success!\f
HGSS.302.0064:
Always aim sky high!
Aim for anything in the sky!\f
HGSS.302.0065:
Fly high!
You can fly anywhere!\f
HGSS.302.0066:
There’s a tomorrow only you can see.
Leap for it!\f
HGSS.302.0067:
The other side of the sky is a glittery
tomorrow! You were born to catch it!\f
HGSS.302.0068:
Those points and these points--let’s go
get ’em!\f
HGSS.302.0069:
One point isn’t useless! It’s the
shortcut to success!\f
HGSS.302.0070:
Don’t overlook one point! Always be
looking one step ahead!\f
HGSS.302.0071:
All right! The Pokéathlon Point King!
All points are mine!\f
HGSS.302.0072:
Take that! And that! I’ll tackle
anything that comes my way!\f
HGSS.302.0073:
All right all right! The tackle fiend!
The number of times: [0137,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.302.0074:
Strike for victory!
[0137,0001,0000] times, that is!\f
HGSS.302.0075:
Nothing can stand in my way!
Tackled [0137,0001,0000] times!\f
HGSS.302.0076:
Why did you fall down so far?! Is there
a hole over there or something?\f
HGSS.302.0077:
To fall from such heights!
That thrilling feeling has got me!\f
HGSS.302.0078:
A Pokéathlete that fights even on the
edge of the ring! Truly serious!\f
HGSS.302.0079:
It’s always a last stand!
That’s why I’m always serious!\f
HGSS.302.0080:
Such running ability! Dash around the
Pokéathlon!\f
HGSS.302.0081:
Run! Seize victory!
Go for it! Seize tomorrow!\f
HGSS.302.0082:
Think you can keep up?
Fast...faster...the fastest!\f
HGSS.302.0083:
Running as fast as lightning!
Can your eyes keep up?!\f
HGSS.302.0084:
Strength isn’t everything! Strategy is
another important factor to success!\f
HGSS.302.0085:
Everything comes down to brains!
You can manipulate the world!\f
HGSS.302.0086:
Always be prepared! That strategy
can be overturned!\f
HGSS.302.0087:
If you know everything about Pokémon,
you can get the best Performance!\f
HGSS.302.0088:
You’re not alone!
Everyone is here competing against you!\f
HGSS.302.0089:
You’re always competing against
everyone! That’s true strength!\f
HGSS.302.0090:
You’ll get stronger by fighting others,
so use their strength to fight!\f
HGSS.302.0091:
Within you are many friends, and
many Pokémon!\f
HGSS.302.0092:
When you fight a true warrior, victory
is within your grasp!\f
HGSS.302.0093:
Outside are many strong Pokémon!
They’ve come to compete!\f
HGSS.302.0094:
You can’t lose to them! You’ve won too
many times!\f
HGSS.302.0095:
Aim to be a stronger Pokéathlete!
Then you’ll win more!\f
HGSS.302.0096:
Your total losses prove your strength!
They show when you’ve faced a warrior!\f
HGSS.302.0097:
There are many strong people out
there. You know that more than anyone!\f
HGSS.302.0098:
Always compete with someone!
And share in that competition!\f
HGSS.302.0099:
I don’t worry about winning or losing,
just that I compete against the best!\f
HGSS.302.0100:
Leave Hurdles to me! I’m a Pokéathlete
that loves Hurdles more than anything!\f
HGSS.302.0101:
There’s no Hurdle I can’t jump! Watch
my beautiful footwork!\f
HGSS.302.0102:
I can climb over any obstacle, I can
jump any Hurdle!\f
HGSS.302.0103:
Hurdles are not obstacles! You can
just run around them!\f
HGSS.302.0104:
I was born to snatch Pennants! I am
the ruler of this beach!\f
HGSS.302.0105:
When you see Pennants, you think of me!
I am a Pennant-capturing hero!\f
HGSS.302.0106:
The sandy beach is my field!
I run about it freely!\f
HGSS.302.0107:
There’s no Pennant I can’t capture!
I’ll even capture the championship!\f
HGSS.302.0108:
Push! Push! Push!
Push it aside!\f
HGSS.302.0109:
There’s nothing I can’t push! I’ll push
you out of the Circle to be alone!\f
HGSS.302.0110:
I’m in a whole new dimension when it
comes to pushing! I was born to push!\f
HGSS.302.0111:
What’s with the intimidation you might
feel? I can push without touching!\f
HGSS.302.0112:
Smash! Crash! Shatter!
I was born to smash Blocks!\f
HGSS.302.0113:
There’s nothing I can’t smash! I am the
Pokéathlon Destruction King!\f
HGSS.302.0114:
There’s a huge wall over there I’m
sure! It’s just there for me to smash!\f
HGSS.302.0115:
Keep breaking Blocks...and you’ll
notice the mountain over there.\f
HGSS.302.0116:
My body just automatically catches any
Discs that come my way!\f
HGSS.302.0117:
I’ve come to catch Discs and catch the
Pokéathlon!\f
HGSS.302.0118:
The Disc you caught is tomorrow’s
shooting star!\f
HGSS.302.0119:
Bring it on. I’ll catch it! I’ll catch
any Disc that comes my way!\f
HGSS.302.0120:
The jump was like the wind!
The form was like a cloud!\f
HGSS.302.0121:
Jump high to the sky!
The form is weightless!\f
HGSS.302.0122:
A Pokéathlete that can read the
flow of the wind and control the air.\f
HGSS.302.0123:
There’s no border between the ground
and the sky within me!\f
HGSS.302.0124:
There’s no one who can stop me!
I was born to run!\f
HGSS.302.0125:
I’ve never seen strength like this!
Just running all day long!\f
HGSS.302.0126:
Once I get moving, I can’t stop!
I’m in a perpetual Pokéathlon!\f
HGSS.302.0127:
My engine is friendship, and my motor
is victory!\f
HGSS.302.0128:
There’s no chance! I’ll knock down all
Pokémon competition!\f
HGSS.302.0129:
Getting in the Ring is the end! Fight to
be the last Pokémon standing!\f
HGSS.302.0130:
Ruler of the Ring!
Enter another’s Ring at your own risk!\f
HGSS.302.0131:
What exactly are you anyway?
That’s what the Ring will tell you!\f
HGSS.302.0132:
Throwing Snow is the best in the world!
With that kind of accuracy, you can win!\f
HGSS.302.0133:
The Snowballs we’re throwing are
rolled-up balls of friendship!\f
HGSS.302.0134:
Such rapid-fire throwing! Who’s that
Snowball for?!\f
HGSS.302.0135:
I don’t know where it will leap from
next! The Snowballs seem to split!\f
HGSS.302.0136:
No one can stop this ball! It will hit
any Goal I aim for!\f
HGSS.302.0137:
Use that wonderful teamwork and make
the Goal!\f
HGSS.302.0138:
Such splendid footwork!
Aim for success!\f
HGSS.302.0139:
Live with the ball.
Live inside the ball!\f
HGSS.302.0140:
Give the points as a gift to them. It’s
the embodiment of fair play.\f
HGSS.302.0141:
Smile even when you miss! The
Pokéathlon isn’t just about winning!\f
HGSS.302.0142:
You don’t hesitate to aim for your
own Goal!\f
HGSS.302.0143:
Don’t fight over who rolled the ball
into your Goal! It’s your friendship!\f
HGSS.302.0144:
Why do you stand out like that? Winning
is not the only thing in the Pokéathlon.\f
HGSS.302.0145:
Here it is! What you’ve all been waiting
for! Autographs after the competition!\f
HGSS.302.0146:
If you want to see me win, I’ll show you
just how I win!\f
HGSS.302.0147:
When I do my best and win, I make
everyone happy!\f
HGSS.302.0198: Aim for the Goal and jump! Run!
HGSS.302.0203: Jump and aim for the lit Lamps!
HGSS.302.0204: Run a Relay with Pokémon! Run!
HGSS.302.0205: Push your rivals out of the Ring!
HGSS.302.0206: Hit as many Pokémon as you can!
HGSS.302.0207: Get the ball in an opponent’s Goal!
HGSS.302.0209:
Touch the Pokémon to jump!
Control three Pokémon at the
same time. Jump the Hurdles!
HGSS.302.0210:
In Hurdle Dash, you race against time to
the finish line. Jump over the Hurdles
and be first to finish. Points are given
based on how many seconds it took all
three Pokémon to reach the finish line.

Speed: Running Speed
Jump: Jump Length
HGSS.302.0211:
Touch the Pokémon to jump!
Jump to clear the Hurdles!

Control three Pokémon at the same
time and finish before
everyone else!
HGSS.302.0212:
Slide the stylus over a
Pokémon to move it! Hit others
from behind to take Pennants!
HGSS.302.0213:
In Pennant Capture, your three Pokémon
run in turns to bring back Pennants.
Up to nine Pennants can be held at
one time. Strike your opponents from
behind to steal their Pennants.

Skill: Ease of Movement
Speed: Running Speed
HGSS.302.0214:
Slide your stylus over your Pokémon
quickly to move it!
The farther you slide, the more it moves!

Be quicker than anyone else to
gather as many Pennants as you
can and bring them back!
HGSS.302.0215:
Use the stylus to move your
Pokémon around! Control
three Pokémon at once!
HGSS.302.0216:
Circle Push is an event where you push
your opponent. If you are inside a Circle
after the timer has counted down,
you are awarded points. The number
written in the Circle is the number of
points you will receive.

Power: Push Power
Stamina: Ability to Keep Pushing
HGSS.302.0217:
Use the stylus to move your
Pokémon around!

Control three Pokémon at once and
aim for the Circle with the
most points!
HGSS.302.0218:
Touch the Blocks to strike!
Touch the Switch button to
switch to the next Pokémon!
HGSS.302.0219:
Block Smash is simply an event where you
smash Blocks. Switch out your Pokémon
as each becomes tired. You receive
points according to how many Blocks
you smash.

Power: Destructive Power
Stamina: Ability to Keep Going
HGSS.302.0220:
Touch the Blocks to smash them!
There’s a barrage of Blocks. Smash as
many as you can!

Touch the Switch button to switch
to the next Pokémon!
HGSS.302.0221:
1) Use the stylus to move
three Pokémon around.
2) Touch to jump and catch!
HGSS.302.0222:
Disc Catch is an event where you control
your three Pokémon at the same time and
jump to catch Discs that come flying
from the sea. The farther back in the
stage that you catch the Discs, the
more points you get.

Jump: Jump Height
Power: Push Power
HGSS.302.0223:
1) Use the stylus to move your Pokémon
around. Control three Pokémon at once.
Push your opponents out of the way to
catch the Discs!

2) Touch your Pokémon lightly to
jump! Catch as many Discs
as you can!
HGSS.302.0224:
Quickly pull the Pokémon
down to jump!
HGSS.302.0225:
In Lamp Jump, you control your three
Pokémon as they try to jump and touch
the Lamps as they light. Try to touch as
many Lamps as you can in one jump.

Jump: Jump Height
Skill: Ability to Jump Sideways
HGSS.302.0226:
Quickly pull the three Pokémon down and
watch them jump!

Pull them diagonally to have them
jump to the side!
HGSS.302.0227:
Quickly flick to dash! Flick as
fast as you can to go faster!
Switch when you’re tired!
HGSS.302.0228:
Relay Run is an event where you move from
Pokémon to Pokémon, trying to run
as far as you can. Switch your Pokémon
when they’re tired. Points will be
awarded based only on the distance run.

Stamina: Endurance
Speed: Running Speed
HGSS.302.0229:
Quickly flick the stylus to the right to
get your Pokémon to dash!

The more you flick to the right, the
faster your Pokémon will go!

Touch the Switch button to
switch to the next Pokémon!
HGSS.302.0230:
1) Use the stylus to move.
2) Quickly flick to tackle!
3) Lightly touch to jump!
HGSS.302.0231:
Ring Drop is an event where you push
your opponent. You get points each time
you push your opponent out of the Ring.
If you push the Switch button in your
corner, you can switch Pokémon.

Stamina: Ability to Resist Pushing
Power: Tackle Strength
HGSS.302.0232:
1) Use the stylus to move your Pokémon!

2) Quickly flick the stylus to tackle!
Blow your opponent away!

3) Lightly touch your
Pokémon to get them to jump!
Your Pokémon can stomp on others!
HGSS.302.0233:
1) Quickly flick upward on
your Pokémon to throw Snow!
2) Touch to hoard more Snow!
HGSS.302.0234:
In Snow Throw, you control three of your
Pokémon at the same time and hit your
opponents with Snowballs. You’ll receive
points no matter who you hit on your
opponent’s team.

Skill: Throwing Accuracy
Power: Snowball Strength
HGSS.302.0235:
1) Flick upward on your Pokémon to
throw a Snowball!

2) When holding a Snowball, touch the
Pokémon to make the Snowball bigger!

Bigger Snowballs can make your
opponent faint on impact!
HGSS.302.0236:
1) Control three Pokémon! Use
the stylus to move around!
2) Flick quickly to dash!
HGSS.302.0237:
In Goal Roll, you try to get the ball into
your opponent’s Goal. It doesn’t matter
which of their Goals--you’ll earn points.
But if the ball ends up in your own Goal,
you’ll lose points.

Skill: Rolling Length
Power: Rolling Strength
HGSS.302.0238:
1) Control three Pokémon at once. Use
the stylus to move your Pokémon!

2) Flick quickly with the stylus to
dash! If you’re dashing, then
you can shoot for the Goal!
HGSS.302.0246: All right! Results of the first event!?\f
HGSS.302.0247: So exciting! How was the second event?!\f
HGSS.302.0248: The end! How was the third event?!\f
HGSS.302.0249: All right! Results of the first event!?\f
HGSS.302.0250: So exciting! How was the second event?!\f
HGSS.302.0251: It’s not over yet! The third event!?\f
HGSS.302.0252: The end! How was the fourth event?!\f
HGSS.302.0254:
This...
was a very close competition!\f
HGSS.302.0255:
This event’s results will be determined
by points!\f
HGSS.302.0256:
Aim to score the most points in the next
competition as well!\f
HGSS.302.0257:
It’s only just begun!
Get ready for the next competition!\f
HGSS.302.0258:
What kind of competition will we see in
the next event?!\f
HGSS.302.0259:
Are they still trying to judge others’
potential? Can’t wait for the next one!\f
HGSS.302.0260:
The first event is finished!
From here on out, it’s for real!\f
HGSS.302.0261:
Suddenly, it’s the final event! Will the
tables be turned this time?!\f
HGSS.302.0262:
Next is the final event!
Do your best!\f
HGSS.302.0263:
Suddenly, we’re at the final event!
Victory could be in anyone’s grasp!\f
HGSS.302.0264:
Everything comes down to the final
event! Give it all you’ve got!\f
HGSS.302.0265:
Everyone in the stadium’s excited! This
is the final event!\f
HGSS.302.0266:
All right!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0267:
Will it be what we expect?!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0268:
Everyone gave it their best!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0269:
Which team is number one?!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0270:
Which team will take the championship?!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0271:
Aim for the highest point total in the
next event!\f
HGSS.302.0272:
It’s only just begun!
Get ready for the next competition!\f
HGSS.302.0273:
What kind of competition will we see in
the next event?!\f
HGSS.302.0274:
Are they still trying to judge others’
potential? Can’t wait for the next one!\f
HGSS.302.0275:
The first event is finished!
From here on out, it’s for real!\f
HGSS.302.0276:
It’s just the second event!
What kind of drama awaits?\f
HGSS.302.0277:
Do you have any strength left?
The third event is about to start!\f
HGSS.302.0278:
We haven’t seen competition yet!
Next is the third event!\f
HGSS.302.0279:
The last-place team still has a chance!
This is the third event!\f
HGSS.302.0280:
The stadium is full of suspense! Here
comes the third event!\f
HGSS.302.0281:
Suddenly, it’s the final event! Will the
tables be turned this time?!\f
HGSS.302.0282:
Next is the final event!
Do your best!\f
HGSS.302.0283:
Suddenly, we’re at the final event!
Victory could be in anyone’s hands!\f
HGSS.302.0284:
Everything comes down to the final
event! Give it all you’ve got!\f
HGSS.302.0285:
Everyone in the stadium’s excited! This
is the final event!\f
HGSS.302.0286:
All right!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0287:
Will it be what we expect?!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0288:
Everyone gave it their best!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0289:
Which team is number one?!
I’ll announce the final results!\f
HGSS.302.0290:
Which team will take the championship?
I’ll announce the final results!\f
